text:
Once upon a time in a cozy little cottage nestled among the rolling hills, there lived a cat named Whiskers. Whiskers was not just any cat; she was a master of the art of nap and had a keen sense of when the perfect spot for a snooze presented itself.

One sunny afternoon, as the golden rays of the sun filtered through the window, casting dappled shadows on the wooden floor, Whiskers decided it was time to find her ideal spot. She sauntered into the kitchen where the warm scent of freshly baked cookies filled the air. The aroma made her nose twitch with delight, but it wasn't food that caught her eye. Instead, she spotted a warm patch of sunlight that had just the right temperature—neither too hot nor too cold—and stretched out in it.

Just then, the doorbell rang, and a small boy, Timmy, who lived next door, came over to visit. He had brought along his favorite stuffed toy,
